subcodes.first_line: O My Name! We make mention of Our loved ones in Ṭá, and give glad tidings unto them that have turned towards and taken hold of the Book of God with power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی انا نذکر اولیائی فی الطاء و نبشر الذین اقبلوا و اخذوا کتاب الله بقوه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @petitions to authorities, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
